main.head: Trader FAQs:
main.pre: Today we’d like to answer the most frequently asked questions about the peculiarities of binary options trading.

one.title: How does IQ Option make money?
one.text: We believe the following video provides the most clear explanation.

two.title: What happens if the expiration price matches the one the option was initially purchased at?
two.text: In such case the option expires At-the-money (zero profit and zero loss) and the investment amount is returned to the investor.

three.title: Does IQ Option manipulate quotes?
three.text:
Absolutely not. We receive the quotes data from our prime broker Thomson Reuters, then we process the numbers and depict the quotes in accordance with the formula Bid+ Ask/2 as we do not have spread.

In order to prove that we do not manipulate the outcomes, we have created a Financial Quotes History on our platform, storing 2 years worth of Thomson Reuters price data. You can rest assured that IQ Option is a transparent broker with the highest business standards
